strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, dojos, and a custom test runner
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matches the role
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is dated (robotic arms era)
Heavy DLang focus in past roles may signal niche-language preference
response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years bar with deep full-stack TypeScript/Node/React experience, strong testing discipline, and directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. Gaps in Nest.js and Kotlin are real but learnable given the demonstrated polyglot track record and architecture exposure.
